name: ruby-sqlite3
title: ruby-sqlite3
description:
SQLite3 interface for Ruby
This module allows Ruby programs to interface with the SQLite3 database
engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-sqlite3 because SQLite3 interface for Ruby.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-sqlite3 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-sqlite3 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-sqlite3 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
